questions.question: 6 (a) All sodium salts are soluble in water. All nitrates are soluble in water. Barium carbonate is insoluble in water. Describe how you would make a pure, dry sample of barium carbonate by precipitation. Include: ● the names of the starting materials ● full practical details ● a chemical equation. ......................................................................
